summary: Clearer visual indication of vertical/architectural line-of-sight blockers before committing movement.
game_context: Cast a ranged spell at the Soul Pillar from an elevated position.
evidence: UI displays 'Path is interrupted' in red
Red targeting line shows obstruction by staircase architecture
Player repeatedly clicks around the target area trying to force a path
Player eventually moves character down the stairs to a flatter area
Sound of repeated failed interaction clicks
Scene: Aidan is positioned on the stairs, attempting to target a Soul Pillar with Guiding Bolt.

summary: Range indicator on the hotbar icon that updates based on the current selected character's position relative to the cursor.
game_context: Target a specific reinforcement on the far side of the room.
evidence: Player drags the targeting reticle across multiple enemies
Player hovers over Raphael, then back to the cambion, then settles on Raphael
Sound of UI error buzzer for range
Scene: Astarion (Aidan) is targeting a distant Vengeful Cambion with Eldritch Blast.
